# Rafael Thayto

> Personal blog and portfolio of Rafael Thayto, a Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience. Features articles about software development, TypeScript, Next.js, Docker, and architecture. Available in Portuguese and English.

## Main Pages

- [Homepage](https://thayto.com/): Professional intro and recent blog posts
- [Blog](https://thayto.com/blog): All articles with search and tag filtering
- [About](https://thayto.com/about): Author bio and background
- [Linktree](https://thayto.com/linktree): Social links aggregator

## Blog Posts

- [Claude Code Faster File Suggestion](https://thayto.com/blog/claude-code-faster-file-suggestion): Improve Claude Code file suggestion with fzf
- [Micro Frontends with Next.js Multi Zones](https://thayto.com/blog/microfrontends-next-js-multi-zones): Guide to implementing Micro Frontends with Next.js
- [Zero Downtime Deployment with Docker Compose](https://thayto.com/blog/zero-downtime-deployment-with-docker-compose-in-an-oci-vps-using-github-actions): Zero-downtime Docker deploys with GitHub Actions
- [Exposing Localhost with Ngrok](https://thayto.com/blog/expondo-seu-localhost-com-ngrok): Tutorial on exposing localhost with ngrok
- [TypeScript Extract String from Literal Types](https://thayto.com/blog/ts-como-pegar-string-no-seu-literal-types): Using Extract type for string literal types
- [TypeScript Template Literal Types](https://thayto.com/blog/typescript-template-literal-types): Guide to TypeScript template literal types
- [Open VS Code from GitHub](https://thayto.com/blog/como-abrir-o-vscode-direto-do-github): Opening VS Code directly from GitHub
- [JS/TS Operators Comparison](https://thayto.com/blog/diferenca-entre-operadores-js-ts): Differences between ??, ?., ==, and === operators
- [Git Bash Aliases like Zsh](https://thayto.com/blog/turbinando-seu-git-bash-windows-adicionando-aliases-como-se-fosse-o-git-plugin-do-zsh): Enhancing Git Bash on Windows with zsh-like aliases
- [Turborepo Deployment on Netlify](https://thayto.com/blog/como-configurar-o-deploy-do-turborepo-no-netlify): Configuring Turborepo deployment on Netlify
- [Set Default Node Version with nvm](https://thayto.com/blog/como-settar-a-versao-default-do-node-usando-nvm): Setting default Node.js version using nvm

## English Versions

- [Homepage (EN)](https://thayto.com/en): English version of the homepage
- [Blog (EN)](https://thayto.com/en/blog): All articles in English
- [About (EN)](https://thayto.com/en/about): Author bio in English

## Social Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/rafa-thayto): Open source contributions and projects
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/thayto): Professional profile
- [X/Twitter](https://x.com/thayto_dev): Tech posts and updates
- [YouTube](https://youtube.com/@thayto_dev): Video content
- [dev.to](https://dev.to/thayto): Cross-posted articles
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/thayto.dev): Social updates
- [Substack](https://thayto.substack.com): Newsletter

## Optional

- [RSS Feed](https://thayto.com/rss.xml): RSS feed for all posts
- [RSS Feed (PT)](https://thayto.com/rss-pt.xml): RSS feed for Portuguese posts
- [RSS Feed (EN)](https://thayto.com/rss-en.xml): RSS feed for English posts
- [Sitemap](https://thayto.com/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for all pages
